## Gate Information

**Gate Name:**
<!-- e.g., MyAwesomeGate -->

**Gate URL:**
<!-- e.g., https://gate.example.com -->

**Mint URL:**
<!-- e.g., https://mint.example.com -->

**Supported Providers:**
<!-- e.g., OpenRouter, OpenAI Direct, Anthropic Direct -->

**Supported Models:**
<!-- e.g., GPT-4, Claude 3, Llama 3 -->

**Markup/Pricing:**
<!-- e.g., 0%, 5%, etc. -->

**Description:**
<!-- Brief description of your gate (1-2 sentences) -->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My gate is publicly accessible
- [ ] My gate accepts Cashu ecash payments
- [ ] I have tested the gate with real requests
